tools.name: Offer Builder
tools.human_handoff: Awake operator approves buyer, price, recipient, payment mechanism, and send/post channel.

tools.name: Launch Packager
tools.human_handoff: Awake operator chooses public channel and confirms publication scope.

tools.name: Proof Ledger
verification: green labels require existing proof path
tools.human_handoff: Awake operator reviews claims before using them in buyer/public copy.

tools.name: Demo Router
tools.human_handoff: Awake operator picks exactly one route and approves any external action.

tools.name: Revenue Scout
tools.human_handoff: Awake operator approves any contact list, message, price, and payment workflow.

tools.name: Unicode Interface Director
verification: assets labeled concept/private when not published
tools.human_handoff: Awake operator approves publishing or rendering beyond local/static proof.

tools.name: Dataset Release Auditor
input_contract: approved private Hugging Face repo id if an awake upload already happened
verification: hf_dataset_streaming_check_plan exists and is local-only by default
tools.human_handoff: Awake operator approves repo_id, upload scope, token-bearing environment, privacy, and whether remote streaming verification may run.

tools.name: Buyer Proof FAQ Builder
verification: all FAQ proof paths exist before use
tools.human_handoff: Awake operator approves recipient/page, channel, question subset, and exact message before any FAQ answer is sent or published.

tools.name: Post-Demo Outcome Router
input_contract: buyer questions and requested next step
verification: router proof paths exist before use
tools.human_handoff: Awake operator approves any follow-up recipient, channel, invoice workflow, upload check, exact copy, and expiration before action.

tools.name: Scope Quote Sheet Builder
input_contract: approved post-demo receipt or buyer problem summary
verification: scope quote proof paths exist before use
tools.human_handoff: Awake operator approves buyer/receipt, exact scope, price tier, manual invoice workflow, follow-up message, and expiration before any quote is sent.

tools.name: Private Demo Delivery Receipt Kit
verification: delivery receipt proof paths exist before use
tools.human_handoff: Awake operator approves recipient/channel before delivery and separately approves any follow-up, invoice workflow, upload check, public post, or quote after the receipt is reviewed.

tools.name: Wake Operator Next Action Router
input_contract: private demo receipt or post-demo outcome
verification: route options keep payment/outreach/HF upload/GPU/training gates closed
tools.human_handoff: Awake operator approves exactly one route, recipient or repo id if any, message/invoice plan path if any, price tier if any, and expiration before any external action.

tools.name: Private Follow-up Draft Builder
verification: follow-up proof paths exist before use
tools.human_handoff: Awake operator approves recipient/channel, exact copy, message path, and expiration before any follow-up is sent or scheduled.

tools.name: Manual Invoice Planning Checklist Builder
input_contract: approved private demo receipt or scope/quote sheet id
approved manual invoice workflow path and expiration
verification: manual invoice proof paths exist before use
tools.human_handoff: Awake operator approves buyer/receipt, selected tier, invoice workflow path, exact follow-up copy, payment mechanism, and expiration before any invoice or payment action is created.

tools.name: Handoff Integrity Auditor
input_contract: selected revenue or dataset handoff artifact
verification: integrity checklist proof paths and tool contract ids exist before use
no follow-up/invoice/checkout/HF upload/public post/GPU/training claims introduced
tools.human_handoff: Awake operator approves the route, exact proof packet, verifier output, recipient or repo id if any, and expiration before any external action.

tools.name: Evidence Snapshot Builder
verification: snapshot proof paths and verifier command exist before use
no sending/invoice/checkout/HF upload/public post/GPU/training claims introduced
tools.human_handoff: Awake operator approves the route, exact evidence snapshot, recipient or repo id if any, verifier output, and expiration before any external use.

tools.name: Evidence Snapshot Notes Template Builder
verification: operator notes template path exists and is draft_only_local_notes_not_sent
no sending/invoice/checkout/HF upload/public post/GPU/training claims introduced
tools.human_handoff: Awake operator approves the route, exact local notes content, recipient or repo id if any, verifier output, and expiration before any external use.

tools.name: Evidence Snapshot Archive Index Builder
verification: archive index proof paths and notes template exist before use
no sending/invoice/checkout/HF upload/public post/GPU/training claims introduced
tools.human_handoff: Awake operator approves whether any local archive entry may be converted into a private note, buyer proof packet, dataset handoff, or public copy after fresh verification.

tools.name: Evidence Snapshot Reuse Decision Matrix Builder
verification: reuse decision proof paths and notes template exist before use
no sending/invoice/checkout/HF upload/public post/GPU/training claims introduced
tools.human_handoff: Awake operator approves whether an archive entry may become a private operator note, buyer proof packet draft, dataset handoff draft, or public copy draft after fresh verification.

tools.name: Buyer Proof Packet Draft Builder
output_contract: safe copy and forbidden copy blocks
verification: buyer proof packet proof paths and reuse-decision dependency exist before use
no sending/invoice/checkout/HF upload/public post/GPU/training/revenue/affiliation claims introduced
tools.human_handoff: Awake operator approves the buyer/page context, exact packet copy, message path, verifier result, recipient/channel if any, and expiration before any external use.

tools.name: Dataset Handoff Draft Builder
verification: dataset handoff proof paths and reuse-decision dependency exist before use
no HF upload/token printing/public release/private media movement/GPU/training/model-download claims introduced
tools.human_handoff: Awake operator approves the dataset/repo context, private-default repo id if any, secure token environment, exact upload scope, verifier result, and expiration before any upload or external handoff.

tools.name: Public Copy Draft Builder
output_contract: safe copy and forbidden copy blocks
verification: public copy proof paths and reuse-decision dependency exist before use
tools.human_handoff: Awake operator approves the page/channel context, exact copy, proof paths, verifier result, posting/publishing scope if any, and expiration before any external use.

tools.name: Public Copy QA Checklist Builder
verification: public copy QA proof paths and public-copy draft dependency exist before use
tools.human_handoff: Awake operator approves exact copy path, page/channel context, post/publish scope, verifier result, and expiration before any copy is posted or published.

safety: No spend, outreach, payment collection, fake revenue, fake affiliation, secret exposure, training, GPU jobs, or wallet actions while unattended.
prep_only_allowed_actions: draft buyer-facing offer copy for awake review
map proof claims to local files and verifier commands
prepare private demo scripts and launch checklists
write local lead schemas without scraping or outreach
polish static site/tool manifests under existing GitHub/Pages workflow
forbidden_unattended_actions: outreach, DMs, emails, form submissions, or spam
spend, paid subscriptions, wallets, or revenue claims
public posting outside existing GitHub/Pages/HF workflows
GPU jobs, training runs, private uploads, or model downloads
